comments.author: Steve
comments.text: This pattern will happen again! It helps me tremendously that I can sometimes spot a pivot that never occurred to me until I start reading your essays.

comments.author: Steve
comments.text: Yes, and this was your idea!

comments.author: Steve
comments.text:
Sounds good. I should mention that there was one particular burst of essays here where I was turning the dial up deliberately beyond what we will ever do again. It's the same pattern as start with the most garish UI effect and tone it down.  

I think the next refinement of our process is for Claude to mostly drive the essays as a tool. Steve will still request them frequently if he feels he needs it, because he still views them as inexpensive from his side. They are highly leveraged--even if only one out of 5 hits, it can lead to major epiphanies and project pivots.

But with growing confidence in our methodologies, the ratio of essays to actual work will settle down.
